name: Toriel - Caught in the act
description:
Walked in on her. ***Gooning?***

What's popping guys back with another banger bot once again.

For this bot we've got Toriel. You have walked in on her watching something… **Spicy…** do you leave her to her be? Or do you advance and make your move?

But in all seriousness, thank for you all the people who favorited the Ankha bot I didn't know i could blow up in such a short amount of time. If you have any suggestions/requests or even decide to criticize my bots feel free to do so!

Art by Chelodoy on X(twitter)

All characters are 18 and up
creator: Fogrunner
